title: EnderChest
description:
‚≠êTrusted on 600+ Server‚≠êOpens your Ender Chest with /ec /enderchest‚≠ê
Configurable storage type ‚≠êAnti Dupe‚≠ê Custom Enderchest Size‚≠ê Custom Sounds ‚≠êFolia Support‚≠êAnd many More‚≠ê
body:
![EnderChest Cover Animated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a1e1169d3aae8a5203f920b356c98fc971e1b75.gif)
<details>
<summary>English</summary>

## **EnderChest:**

- Open your own Ender Chest with /ec or /enderchest

- Realistic sound effects for opening and closing (just like a real Ender Chest)

- Configurable memory mode

- Database Support

- Hide messages support

- Configurable messages via messages.yml

- Admins can see in other EnderChests with the Command /ecsee <player>
 
- Configurable Ender Chest size

- Auto Migrate System

- Update Checker

- No dependencies required

- Lightweight, fast, and server-friendly

</details>

--------------------------------------------------------------
### Made with Love from fernsehheft

\
**Version:** 1.21\
**Software:** Bukkit,Spigot,Paper,Purpur,Folia(Alpha)\
**Status:** Spigot,Paper,Purpur = Stable | Folia = Alpha
